---
title: "Your Proposal Title Here"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: american-political-science-association.csl
nocite: |
  @*
citeproc: true
---

# References Cited

<!-- REFERENCES CITED – No page limit.
     Uploaded separately to Research.gov.

     citeproc: true forces Pandoc (not Typst) to process the bibliography,
     which correctly handles nocite: '@*' to include all bib entries.
     The {#refs} div below is where Pandoc places the formatted list.
     The raw Typst block sets hanging indentation for reference entries.

     Add your citations to references.bib. Any entry cited in
     project-description.qmd or listed here via nocite will appear. -->

```{=typst}
#set par(hanging-indent: 1.5em, first-line-indent: 0em)
```

::: {#refs}
:::
